sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Tier 3 source

special_mechanics.name: Character Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between Maui (ranged bug-launcher) and Cold Shadow (melee bo staff). Cold Shadow form requires ninja tokens for metamorphosis.

special_mechanics.name: Bo Staff Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Cold Shadow's bo staff used for both combat and environmental interaction including climbing narrow tunnels and exploring level geometry.

physics_values.staff_attack_chaining: skill-based progression with token collection (SNES version)
physics_values.level_constraints: some levels prevent Cold Shadow transformation (e.g., bungee jump on vines requires Maui form)

special_mechanics.name: Bungee Jump
special_mechanics.description: Maui-exclusive vine-based traversal mechanic requiring transformation prevention in certain levels.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Qualitative gameplay documentation only. Wikipedia source contains game design overview, character mechanics, and gameplay features but no quantitative physics parameters (velocities, acceleration values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel precision data). Movement mechanics inferred from gameplay description rather than technical specification.
sources_used: wikipedia: Maui Mallard in Cold Shadow article (Gameplay section)
